title.ko: 유기 전기 고체 상태 장치
title.en: ORGANIC ELECTRIC SOLID-STATE DEVICES

definition.ko: 교정, 증폭, 진동 또는 전환에 특별히 적합한 유기 장치 장치 H10K10/00 통합 장치 또는 여러 장치의 어셈블리 H10K19/00 유기 방사선에 민감한 장치 장치 H10K30/00 통합 장치 또는 여러 장치의 어셈블리 H10K39/00 유기 발광 소자 장치 H10K50/00 통합 장치 또는 여러 장치의 어셈블리 H10K59/00 하나 이상의 유기 방사선 감수성 소자 및 하나 이상의 유기 발광 소자 H10K65/00을 포함하는 통합 소자 또는 복수의 소자의 조립체 제조 또는 처리, 구조 세부 정보 제조 또는 처리 H10K71/00 시공상세서 H10K77/00 유기 활물질 H10K85/00 본 하위 클래스의 다른 그룹에는 제공되지 않는 주제 H10K99/00 인덱싱 구성표 인덱싱 구성표 H10K101/00, H10K102/00

title.ko: 정류, 증폭, 진동 또는 스위칭에 특히 적합한 유기 장치; 전위장벽을 갖는 유기 커패시터 또는 저항기 (다수의 장치의 통합된 장치 또는 조립체 H10K19/00)
title.en: Organic devices specially adapted for rectifying, amplifying, oscillating or switching

title.ko: 정류, 증폭, 진동 또는 스위칭에 특히 적합한 유기 장치; 전위장벽을 갖는 유기 커패시터 또는 저항기 (다수의 장치의 통합된 장치 또는 조립체 H10K19/00)
title.en: Organic devices specially adapted for rectifying, amplifying, oscillating or switching; Organic capacitors or resistors having potential barriers (integrated devices or assemblies of multiple devices H10K0019000000)
Organic capacitors or resistors having potential barriers
Organic diodes
Schottky diodes
Diodes comprising organic-organic junctions
Diodes comprising organic-inorganic heterojunctions

title.ko: 유기 트랜지스터
title.en: Organic transistors
Bipolar transistors, e.g. organic bipolar junction transistors [OBJT]

title.ko: 전계 효과 트랜지스터, 예. 유기 박막 트랜지스터 [OTFT] (H10K10/43 우선)
title.en: Field-effect transistors, e.g. organic thin-film transistors [OTFT] (H10K0010430000 takes precedence)
Bistable switching devices
Constructional details
Electrodes
Ohmic electrodes, e.g. source or drain electrodes
Schottky electrodes
Passivation; Containers; Encapsulations

title.ko: 그룹 H10K10/00에 포함된, 정류, 증폭, 진동 또는 스위에 특히 적합한 적어도 하나의 유기 소자를 포함하는, 집적 소자, 또는 다중 소자의 조립체
title.en: Integrated devices, or assemblies of multiple devices, comprising at least one organic element specially adapted for rectifying, amplifying, oscillating or switching, covered by group H10K0010000000
comprising field-effect transistors
comprising components having an active region that includes an inorganic semiconductor
Interconnections, e.g. terminals

title.ko: 적외선, 빛, 단파장의 전자기 방사선 또는 입자 방사선 감응성 유기 소자 (집적 소자 또는 다중 소자의 어셈블리 H10K39/00, H10K65/00, 전해광-감응 소자 H01G9/20)
title.en: Organic radiation-sensitive devices

definition.ko: 이 그룹은이 방사선 감응 유기 반도체 장치를 대상으로 하며, 다음에 하나에 특별히 적합하다 ·방사 에너지를 전기에너지로 변환하는 방법 ·그러한 방사선에 의한 전기 에너지 제어.

title.ko: 적외선, 빛, 단파장의 전자기 방사선 또는 입자 방사선 감응성 유기 소자 (집적 소자 또는 다중 소자의 어셈블리 H10K39/00, H10K65/00, 전해광-감응 소자 H01G9/20)
title.en: Organic devices sensitive to infrared radiation, light, electromagnetic radiation of shorter wavelength or corpuscular radiation (integrated devices or assemblies of multiple devices H10K0039000000, H10K0065000000;electrolytic light-sensitive devices H01G0009200000)

definition.ko: 이 그룹은이 방사선 감응 유기 반도체 장치를 대상으로 하며, 다음에 하나에 특별히 적합하다 ·방사 에너지를 전기에너지로 변환하는 방법 ·그러한 방사선에 의한 전기 에너지 제어.

title.ko: 유기 반도체와 무기 반도체 사이의 이종 접합을 포함하는 것
title.en: comprising heterojunctions between organic semiconductors and inorganic semiconductors

title.ko: 감광 광대역 갭 반도체 장치, 예. 염료 감작 TiO (액체 전해질 또는 고체 전해질을 포함하는 광전기 화학 장치 H01G9/20)
title.en: Sensitised wide-bandgap semiconductor devices, e.g. dye-sensitised TiO2 (photo-electrochemical devices comprising a liquid electrolyte or a solid electrolyte H01G0009200000)
comprising organic-organic junctions, e.g. donor-acceptor junctions
comprising bulk heterojunctions, e.g. interpenetrating networks of donor and acceptor material domains
comprising inorganic nanostructures, e.g. CdSe nanoparticles
comprising a p-i-n structure, e.g. having a perovskite absorber between p-type and n-type charge transport layers
Photovoltaic [PV] devices
in the form of fibres or tubes, e.g. photovoltaic fibres
comprising multiple junctions, e.g. tandem PV cells
in which radiation controls flow of current through the devices, e.g. photoresistors
Light-sensitive field-effect devices, e.g. phototransistors
Constructional details
Electrodes
Transparent electrodes, e.g. indium tin oxide [ITO] electrodes
comprising arrangements for extracting the current from the cell, e.g. metal finger grid systems to reduce the serial resistance of transparent electrodes
Layers having high charge carrier mobility
Layers having high electron mobility, e.g. electron-transporting layers or hole-blocking layers
Layers having high hole mobility, e.g. hole-transporting layers or electron-blocking layers
Light-trapping means
Passivation; Containers; Encapsulations
Terminals, e.g. bond pads

title.ko: 그룹 H10K30/00에 포함된 적어도 하나의 유기 방사선 감응 요소를 포함하는, 집적 소자, 또는 다중 소자의 조립체
title.en: Integrated devices, or assemblies of multiple devices, comprising at least one organic radiation-sensitive element covered by group H10K0030000000

definition.ko: 이 그룹은 적외선, 빛, 단파장의 전자파 또는 입자선 감응 장치와 관련됩니다.

title.en: Organic photovoltaic [PV] modules; Arrays of single organic PV cells
Electrical configurations of PV cells, e.g. series connections or parallel connections
comprising both organic PV cells and inorganic PV cells
Interconnections, e.g. terminals
Devices controlled by radiation
Organic image sensors
integrated with organic light-emitting diodes [OLED]
Devices specially adapted for detecting X-ray radiation
Interconnections, e.g. terminals

title.ko: 유기 광 발광 장치 (집적 소자 또는 다중 소자의 어셈블리 H10K59/00, H10K65/00; 유기 반도체 레이저 H01S5/36)
title.en: Organic light-emitting devices

title.ko: 유기 광 발광 장치 (집적 소자 또는 다중 소자의 어셈블리 H10K59/00, H10K65/00; 유기 반도체 레이저 H01S5/36)
title.en: Organic light-emitting devices (integrated devices or assemblies of multiple devices H10K0059000000, H10K0065000000;organic semiconductor lasers H01S0005360000)
OLEDs or polymer light-emitting diodes [PLED]
characterised by the electroluminescent [EL] layers
comprising active inorganic nanostructures, e.g. luminescent quantum dots
comprising dopants
specially adapted for multicolour light emission, e.g. for emitting white light
comprising stacked EL layers within one EL unit
comprising mobile ions
Carrier transporting layers

comprising dopants

comprising dopants
Carrier injection layers
Carrier blocking layers

Organic light-emitting transistors

Electrodes
Anodes
characterised by their shape
combined with auxiliary electrodes, e.g. ITO layer combined with metal lines
Multilayers, e.g. transparent multilayers
Reflective anodes, e.g. ITO combined with thick metallic layers

characterised by their shape
combined with auxiliary electrodes
Multilayers, e.g. opaque multilayers
Transparent cathodes, e.g. comprising thin metal layers

Containers
Encapsulations

comprising a resonant cavity structure, e.g. Bragg reflector pair
comprising scattering means
comprising reflective means
comprising refractive means, e.g. lenses
Arrangements for improving contrast, e.g. preventing reflection of ambient light
Arrangements for heating or cooling
Terminals, e.g. bond pads

title.ko: 그룹 H10K50/00에 포함되는 하나 이상의 유기 발광 소자를 포함하는 집적 소자 또는 다중 소자의 어셈블리
title.en: Integrated devices, or assemblies of multiple devices, comprising at least one organic light-emitting element covered by group H10K0050000000
OLED displays
Active-matrix OLED [AMOLED] displays
characterised by the geometry or disposition of pixel elements
Pixel-defining structures or layers, e.g. banks
Connection of the pixel electrodes to the thin film transistors [TFT]
Insulating layers formed between TFT elements and OLED elements
including organic TFTs [OTFT]
Shielding, e.g. light-blocking means over the TFTs
comprising two substrates, e.g. display comprising OLED array and TFT driving circuitry on different substrates
comprising two independent displays, e.g. for emitting information from two major sides of the display
Chiplets
comprising photosensors that control luminance
Interconnections, e.g. wiring lines or terminals
Passive-matrix OLED displays
comprising banks or shadow masks
comprising two independent displays, e.g. for emitting information from two major sides of the display
Interconnections, e.g. wiring lines or terminals
Tiled displays
Segment displays
Devices specially adapted for multicolour light emission
Stacked devices having two or more layers, each emitting at different wavelengths
comprising red-green-blue [RGB] subpixels
comprising colour filters or colour changing media [CCM]
OLEDs integrated with touch screens
OLEDs integrated with light modulating elements, e.g. with electrochromic elements, photochromic elements or liquid crystal elements
OLEDs integrated with inorganic light-sensitive elements, e.g. with inorganic solar cells or inorganic photodiodes
OLEDs integrated with inorganic image sensors
OLEDs integrated with inorganic light-emitting elements, e.g. with inorganic electroluminescent elements

title.ko: 구조적 세부
title.en: Constructional details

title.ko: 상호연결, 예. 단자 (H10K59/131, H10K59/179가 우선)
title.en: Interconnections, e.g. terminals (H10K0059131000, H10K0059179000 take precedence)
Parallel electrical configurations of multiple OLEDs
Series electrical configurations of multiple OLEDs
Dummy elements, i.e. elements having non-functional features
Assemblies of multiple devices comprising at least one organic light-emitting element
wherein all light-emitting elements are organic, e.g. assembled OLED displays

title.ko: 하나 이상의 유기 발광 소자 및 하나 이상의 유기 방사선 감응 소자를 포함하는 집적 소자, 또는 다중 소자 어셈블리, 예. 유기 옵토-커플러 (유기 발광 소자와 통합된 유기 이미지 센서 H10K39/34; 광센서가 내장된 OLED 디스플레이 H10K59/13)
title.en: Integrated devices, or assemblies of multiple devices, comprising at least one organic light-emitting element and at least one organic radiation-sensitive element, e.g. organic opto-couplers   (organic image sensors integrated with organic light-emitting devices H10K0039340000;  OLED displays integrated with photosensors H10K0059130000)
Manufacture or treatment; Constructional details
Manufacture or treatment specially adapted for the organic devices covered by this subclass
Deposition of organic active material
using liquid deposition, e.g. spin coating
using printing techniques, e.g. ink-jet printing or screen printing
characterised by the solvent used
using physical vapour deposition [PVD], e.g. vacuum deposition or sputtering
using non-liquid printing techniques, e.g. thermal transfer printing from a donor sheet
Changing the shape of the active layer in the devices, e.g. patterning
Doping active layers, e.g. electron transporting layers
Thermal treatment, e.g. annealing in the presence of a solvent vapour
Forming devices by joining two substrates together, e.g. lamination techniques
Forming conductive regions or layers, e.g. electrodes
Testing, e.g. accelerated lifetime tests
using temporary substrates

title.ko: 이 서브클래스에 포함되고 그룹 H10K10/80, H10K30/80, H10K50/80 또는 H10K59/80에 포함되지 않는 장치의 구조상 세부사항
title.en: Constructional details of devices covered by this subclass and not covered by groups H10K0010800000, H10K0030800000, H10K0050800000 or H10K0059800000
Substrates, e.g. flexible substrates

title.ko: 이 서브클래스에 포함되는 장치의 본체 또는 전극에 사용되는 유기 재료
title.en: Organic materials used in the body or electrodes of devices covered by this subclass

definition.ko: 이 그룹은 이 서브클래스에 포함되는 장치에 특히 적합한 경우에 한하여 전기적 또는 기타 속성에 관한 유기 재료만을 다룹니다.

title.en: Organic polymers or oligomers
Carbon compounds, e.g. carbon nanotubes or fullerenes
Coordination compounds
Organosilicon compounds, e.g. TIPS pentacene
Organic perovskites; Hybrid organic-inorganic perovskites [HOIP], e.g. CH3NH3PbI3

title.ko: 저분자량 유기화합물 (H10K85/10 ~ H10K85/50 우선)
title.en: Organic compounds having low molecular weight (H10K0085100000-H10K0085500000 take precedence)
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass

title.ko: 그룹 H10K85/00와 관련된 유기 물질의 특성
title.en: Indexing scheme associated with group H10K0085000000, relating to properties of organic materials

title.ko: 그룹 H10K85/00와 관련된 유기 물질의 특성
title.en: Properties of the organic materials covered by group H10K0085000000
Triplet emission
Delayed fluorescence emission
using exciplex
Highest occupied molecular orbital [HOMO], lowest unoccupied molecular orbital [LUMO] or Fermi energy values
Interrelation of parameters between multiple constituent active layers or sublayers, e.g. HOMO values in adjacent layers
Oxidation-reduction potentials, e.g. excited state redox potentials
Up-conversion, e.g. by triplet-triplet annihilation
Down-conversion, e.g. by singlet fission
Indexing scheme associated with groups H10K0010800000, H10K0030800000, H10K0050800000, H10K0059800000 and H10K0077000000, relating to constructional details
Constructional details relating to the organic devices covered by this subclass
Transparent electrodes, e.g. using graphene
Metallic electrodes, e.g. using a stack of layers
